title: Build analytics projection from source envelopes
requirements: Add service to upsert AnalyticsContentObject from SourceObjectEnvelope.
Create AnalyticsExtractionPacket from envelope without direct reads of domain tables.
Persist facts returned by adapter extract_analytics_facts or extracted from packet text.
Support deactivate/tombstone for deleted source objects.
Keep analytics PII behavior aligned with envelope privacy profile.
Do not duplicate full source records beyond approved normalized payload and packet fields.
